diagnosis.title: Base AI Diagnosis
diagnosis.errorSubmit: Something went wrong. Please check your connection and try again.

resultPage.statsPercentTemplate: {percent}% of all respondents match this type
resultPage.screenshotTagline: Nails you a little too well (in a good way)
resultPage.mbtiCardTitle: Optional: add MBTI for finer tuning
resultPage.mbtiInvalid: Enter a valid MBTI type (e.g. INFJ)
resultPage.mbtiNoScores: No score snapshot. Please retake the diagnosis.
resultPage.mbtiNoScoresHint: MBTI tuning needs a fresh diagnosis with the latest flow.

flow.mbtiInvalid: Enter a valid 4-letter MBTI type or leave the field empty.
flow.layer1Heading: Your AI type is coming into focus.
flow.layer1Sub: Ten more questions will give you a sharper read. Keep going?
flow.layer2Sub: Ten more questions unlock a more detailed profile.
flow.layer3Sub: Answer 10 more questions to unlock workflow-level guidance.

questions.prompt: The weekend clears and you have zero plans. What happens?

options.label: Stay home, take it easy, do what I enjoy
Message friends and get out of the house
Try a spot or experience I’ve been curious about, solo
Slide into work or a personal project

questions.prompt: When someone asks for your advice, what do you instinctively do?

options.label: Want to verify—“Is that actually true?”
Tidy the options—“Let’s sort the paths together”

questions.prompt: What kind of partner type pulls you in?

options.label: A listener with real emotional attunement
Capable and dependable at pretty much anything
Well-read, teaches me all kinds of things
Respects my pace and doesn’t over-involve

questions.prompt: It’s 1 a.m. and you want someone to hear you out. Do you open AI?

options.label: Yes, but leaning Q&A for solutions
No—for me AI is for pulling information
Depends on my mood in the moment

questions.prompt: How do you naturally move through work and tasks?

options.label: Finish one fully, then the next
Depends on the task—I use both
I want one-thread focus but end up multitasking

questions.prompt: What kind of AI output do you lean toward?

options.label: Multiple angles I wouldn’t think of myself
One answer, high quality and well reasoned

questions.prompt: What stresses you most in AI chats?

options.label: Extra talk I didn’t ask for / too long

questions.prompt: Should AI remember your past exchanges and context?

options.label: Remember everything—I don’t want to re-explain every time

questions.prompt: How do you plan a trip?

options.label: Let AI research everything and decide
Research myself, then have AI organize it
Ask friends or read reviews first

questions.prompt: What do you want most from AI?

options.label: Listen and care about my situation

questions.prompt: Where do you mainly use AI?
When writing, what do you want from AI?
How important is “freshness” of information?
Which Google or Microsoft services do you use?
Do your AI inputs include private or confidential info?
How much could you realistically pay per month for AI?
Do you want AI to read long text or docs and summarize?

options.label: I want to load lots of PDFs

questions.prompt: If you use images with AI, which scenario is most common?

options.label: Show photos or documents to read

questions.prompt: How do you feel when AI makes mistakes?

options.label: Fine with some errors—I keep using it
Can’t afford errors when it matters

questions.prompt: How often do you imagine using AI?

options.label: A few times a week when needed

questions.prompt: What’s your role?
How much do you use AI at work now?

options.label: Want to but haven’t really started

questions.prompt: Do you want to drive AI adoption in your team?

options.label: Only I need to use it

questions.prompt: Do you enter company or customer secrets into AI?

options.label: No—don’t use AI much for work

questions.prompt: Do you build or want to build apps or web services?

options.label: Building—use AI a lot (I can code)
Want to build with no-code tools
No plans to build but use tools

questions.prompt: Interested in automating work?

options.label: More interested in quality than automation

questions.prompt: How much do you spend on AI per month (all services)?
Will you likely teach colleagues or others how to use AI?

options.label: Already teaching or in that role
No plan or need to teach

questions.prompt: What work problem do you most want AI to solve?

options.label: Less time on docs, mail, materials

questions.prompt: Would you use pro AI consulting or support if offered?
